style_rules.base_3d_low_poly: faceted polygons only, flat shading per face, no textures, no gradients within faces
style_rules.palette: premium warm sunrise/dusk palette (muted, not neon)

hybrid_rule.rule: Hybrid = base structure from plant A + signature top element from plant B; must be one coherent plant silhouette.
hybrid_rule.prompt_template: Minimalist low-poly 3D plant asset for “QuissMe”. The subject is constructed solely from visible sharp-edged geometric polygons (facets). Flat shading applied: each polygon face is a single uniform color with no gradients, no textures, no patterns. Clean digital render, premium warm sunrise/dusk palette (muted, not neon). Friendly abstract proportions. Transparent background. No heavy shadows. Slight isometric 3/4 view, centered. Create a single hybrid low-poly plant by combining {PLANT_A} base structure with {{PLANT_B}} signature top element. It must still look like one coherent plant, not two objects.

families.descriptor: a faceted rosebud with layered polygon petals
families.notes: Keep the bud elegant and compact; warm blush tones, no neon.

families.descriptor: a fuller faceted bloom with layered petals (still angular)
families.notes: More volume than rosebud; still crisp facets.

families.descriptor: two faceted vines forming a subtle heart-shaped loop
families.notes: Heart shape should be subtle and premium, not cartoonish.

families.descriptor: a tuft of soft-looking faceted grass blades leaning inward
families.notes: Blades lean toward center to imply closeness; keep it minimal.

families.descriptor: a neat row of faceted lavender spikes, structured rhythm
families.notes: Looks organized; row reads as 'pattern' and 'routine'.

families.descriptor: a small faceted bonsai tree with a geometric canopy
families.notes: Geometric canopy with tiered planes; calm, balanced silhouette.

families.descriptor: two or three tall faceted reeds with a calm vertical rhythm
families.notes: Vertical rhythm; slight bend allowed but keep angular facets.

families.descriptor: three faceted stepping stones arranged as a gentle path marker
families.notes: Object-family (still counts as placement); conveys direction/flow.

families.descriptor: a faceted pine sprig with triangular needle clusters
families.notes: Resilient, not aggressive; keep shapes tidy and premium.

families.descriptor: a faceted thistle with a strong crown and spiky leaf facets (not aggressive)
a faceted rock with soft faceted moss patches on top
families.notes: Rock as grounded resilience; moss adds warmth.

families.descriptor: a faceted leaf plant with mineral-like leaf planes, warm translucent impression without gradients
families.notes: Mineral vibe but muted; avoid neon/laser look; still flat shaded.
